title: The Multi-phase Biconical Outflow in the local IR-Luminous Merger IRASF01364-1042
comment: 23 pages, 16 figures, accepted for publication in A & A
summary: We investigate the spatially-resolved ISM properties of the local ($z = 0.048$), IR-luminous ($L_{\rm IR} = 10^{11.87}$\,L$_\odot$), late-stage galaxy merger IRAS F01364-1042, combining multi-wavelength IFU observations from \textit{JWST/MIRI-MRS}, ALMA and Keck/KCWI. Using these datasets, we construct emission line maps of several key tracers of the ionized (e.g., [Ne\,II]\,12.8$μ$m, [O\,III]$\lambda5007$), warm molecular (e.g., \ce{H2}\,0-0\,S(3)), and cold molecular gas (e.g., CO (J$=2-1$)), and perform detailed decomposition of spectra extracted in resolved regions across the areas of emission. We confirm the presence of a multi-phase galactic biconical outflow along the minor axis of a highly inclined rotating disk. The inferred outflow velocities are $\sim\,$500 - 600\,km\,s$^{-1}$ $\sim\,$350\,km\,s$^{-1}$, and $\sim\,$200 - 300\,km\,s$^{-1}$, in the ionized, warm and cold molecular phase, respectively, with corresponding mass outflow rates of $\sim 0.3 - 2.3$, $\sim 31$, and $\sim 38 - 240$\,M$_\odot\,$yr$^{-1}$. The cold molecular phase dominates both the total mass outflow rate and the associated kinetic energy ($\sim\,2 - 8 \times 10^{42}$\,erg\,s$^{-1}$). We confirm, for the first time, a dust-obscured AGN in IRAS\,F01364-1042, via detection of the [Ne\,V]\,14.3$μ$m line. The low inferred AGN bolometric luminosity ($1.2 - 1.8 \times 10^{43}$\,erg\,s$^{-1}$) suggests that the nuclear starburst alone, with a star formation rate of $\sim 40 - 60$\,M$_\odot$\,yr$^{-1}$, can account for the energy required to drive the outflow, though a more active AGN phase in the recent past may have also played a role. Our work showcases the necessity of multi-wavelength observations for interpreting the gas dynamics in merger-driven dusty starbursts, and the capability of \textit{JWST/MIRI-MRS} to uncover obscured, low-luminosity AGN that may be common in these systems.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST、ALMA和Keck的多波段IFU观测，研究了局部红外亮星系并合体IRAS F01364-1042的空间分辨ISM特性。确认存在多相星系双锥状外流，其中冷分子相主导质量外流率和动能。首次通过[Ne V]线检测到尘埃遮蔽的AGN，但核星暴足以驱动外流。
AI.motivation: 理解并合驱动尘埃星暴星系的星际介质特性、多相气体外流动力学，以及探测其中可能存在的遮蔽低光度AGN。
AI.method: 结合JWST/MIRI-MRS、ALMA和Keck/KCWI的多波段IFU观测，构建电离气体、暖分子和冷分子气体发射线图，并对分辨区域的光谱进行详细分解。
AI.result: 确认多相双锥状外流，电离相、暖分子相和冷分子相外流速度分别约500-600、~350和200-300 km/s，质量外流率分别约0.3-2.3、~31和38-240 M☉/yr。冷分子相主导总质量外流率和动能(~2-8×10^42 erg/s)。首次通过[Ne V]线探测到尘埃遮蔽AGN，其辐射热光度约1.2-1.8×10^43 erg/s。
AI.conclusion: 核星暴（SFR约40-60 M☉/yr）足以提供驱动外流所需的能量，尽管近期更活跃的AGN也可能起过作用。多波段观测对解析并合驱动尘埃星暴星系的气体动力学至关重要，JWST/MIRI-MRS有能力揭示其中常见的遮蔽低光度AGN。

title: Strong [OIII]$+$H$β$ emitters dominated the ionizing budget at $z\sim7$
comment: 15 pages, 10 figures, 3 tables; submitted to ApJ
summary: We quantify the ionizing photon production at $z\sim7$ using the deepest spectroscopically confirmed sample of strong [OIII]$+$H$β$ emitters (rest-frame EW$>740$ A) in the Abell 2744 field. Leveraging ultra-deep UNCOVER F410M imaging ($5σ\sim29$ AB) and gravitational lensing, we probe an order of magnitude deeper than previous JWST WFSS [OIII] studies, reaching a luminosity limit of $\log(L_{\rm{[OIII]}+\rm{H}β}/\text{erg s}^{-1})=41.3$. Our rest-frame optical emission-line selection probes some of the youngest, metal- and dust-poor galaxies, identifying a large population of continuum-faint, ionizing candidates. NIRSpec follow-up of a luminosity-representative subset confirms $72\%$ of targets, providing detailed characterization of 18 emitters. Balmer decrements reveal negligible dust, while strong-line diagnostics indicate extremely low metallicities ($12+\log(\text{O/H})=6.8\text{--}7.7$). With typical [OII]/[OIII] ratios of $0.054\pm0.007$, we infer an average Lyman continuum escape fraction near the canonical $f_{\text{esc}}=20\%$. Correcting for the spectroscopic confirmation rate, we find that these high-EW emitters represent $56\pm12\%$ of the total UV-selected population by number density. Integrated to our survey limits, the ionizing budget of these emitters ($\log(\dot{N}_{\rm ion}/{\rm s}^{-1}\,\text{Mpc}^{-3})=50.63\pm0.05$) accounts for $\sim70\%$ of the total budget required for reionization at $z\sim7$. This result is consistent with empirical benchmarks. These results establish [OIII]$+$H$β$ selection as a powerful, dust-insensitive probe, showing that known galaxy populations significantly power reionization.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用JWST超深场数据与引力透镜效应，在红移~7处筛选出强[OIII]+Hβ发射线星系，发现这些年轻、贫金属、低尘埃的星系贡献了再电离所需电离光子预算的约70%，证实已知星系群体是再电离的重要动力来源。
AI.motivation: 量化红移~7处电离光子的产生速率，评估已知星系群体在再电离过程中的贡献。
AI.method: 利用UNCOVER超深F410M成像与引力透镜效应，结合NIRSpec光谱确认，通过强[OIII]+Hβ发射线筛选年轻、贫金属、低尘埃的星系候选体，并测量其物理性质与电离光子逃逸分数。
AI.result: 高等值宽发射线星系占UV选择总体的56±12%；电离光子产生率log(ṅion)=50.63±0.05，贡献了再电离所需总预算的约70%。
AI.conclusion: [OIII]+Hβ选择是一种强有力的、不受尘埃影响的探测手段，表明已知的星系群体在再电离过程中发挥着主导作用。

title: Mapping Active Star-Formation in Serpens and the Aquila Rift
summary: We report the results of a high-sensitivity survey for Herbig-Haro (HH) outflows in the Serpens-Aquila Rift using the DECam instrument on the 4-meter telescope. We have detected 88 new HH objects, more than tripling the total known in this region. We have also identified likely progenitors for most of these outflows. By combining HH object and progenitor locations with literature dust maps and Gaia astrometry, we find that HH objects mark five spatially distinct clouds hosting active star formation: the Serpens Molecular Cloud and LDN 673 at 400-500 pc, the more distant West and East components of the Aquila Rift at ~600 and 700 pc, respectively, and a near cloud in Serpens at ~250 pc. In both the Serpens Molecular Cloud and the Western Aquila Rift, HH objects broadly trace gas structures on the edges of low-density cavities surrounding known stellar populations, consistent with active star formation in feedback-driven shells. The near cloud in Serpens is not associated with any established stellar population, but its position and velocity suggest that it is part of the Local Bubble. And the HH objects there may mark the start of a new stellar generation connected to the Scutum North Association. Our Herbig-Haro objects therefore serve as a powerful indicator of star formation sites even in the absence of astrometrically characterized young stars, making them a useful tool for guiding future YSO surveys.

AI.tldr: 本文利用DECam在蛇夫-天鹰裂隙进行高灵敏度HH天体巡测，新发现88个HH天体，使该区域已知总数增加三倍以上。结合尘埃图和Gaia数据，识别出五个活跃恒星形成云，并发现HH天体可有效示踪反馈驱动的星形成区域，即使在缺乏天文学家表征的年轻恒星时也能指示星形成位置。
AI.motivation: 蛇夫-天鹰裂隙是恒星形成活跃区，但此前HH天体巡测不够全面，限制了对其星形成结构和动力学过程的理解。
AI.method: 使用DECam在4米望远镜上进行高灵敏度巡测，结合尘埃图、Gaia天体测量数据和前身星识别，对HH天体及其所在分子云进行空间和运动学分析。
AI.result: 新发现88个HH天体，识别出5个独立的活跃恒星形成云（蛇夫分子云、LDN 673、西天鹰裂隙、东天鹰裂隙、蛇夫近距云），空间分布揭示反馈驱动的空腔结构。
AI.conclusion: HH天体即使在没有已表征的年轻恒星时也能有效指示星形成位置，可作为未来YSO巡测的有力工具；蛇夫近距云可能属于Local Bubble，与Scutum North Association相关。

title: AGN Line-Intensity Mapping: A Probe of Faint Black Holes at Cosmic Noon
summary: We propose line-intensity mapping (LIM) as a new probe of active galactic nuclei (AGN). By cross-correlating [Ne V] intensity maps with galaxy redshift surveys, we show that the cumulative AGN line emission can be detected even when individual sources are below the detection threshold. The 97.1 eV ionization potential of [Ne V] makes it an essentially uncontaminated tracer of AGN activity, arising from the narrow line region which is accessible even in heavily obscured AGN. We forecast signal-to-noise ratios using a Fisher matrix formalism for two hypothetical future instruments: a CDIM-like instrument targeting [Ne V] $λ3426$ and a PRIMA-like instrument optimized for LIM targeting [Ne V] $14.3 μ$m. For the CDIM-like case we find strong constraints on the product of the mean AGN intensity and bias, $S_{\rm NeV} b_{\rm NeV}$, across $z=2-3$, with redshift-space distortions enabling individual constraints on $S_{\rm NeV}$ and $b_{\rm NeV}$. The LIM signal retains sensitivity to AGN below the $5σ$ direct detection threshold, which at $z=3$ corresponds to $L_{\rm bol} \sim 5\times10^{43}$ erg s$^{-1}$ and coincides with the faint end of existing luminosity function measurements. Roughly 10% of the total signal originates from below this threshold, with the sub-threshold population detectable at $S/N=9-4$ across $z=2-3$ (for $S_{\rm NeV} b_{\rm NeV}$). The PRIMA-like instrument achieves slightly lower signal-to-noise but provides a complementary probe of the AGN population due to the insensitivity of the $14.3 μ$m line to dust attenuation. AGN LIM can potentially be applied to several scientific problems including tracing the total AGN emissivity history, constraining the black hole-halo connection at faint luminosities, and discriminating between supermassive black hole seeding mechanisms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用谱线强度映射（LIM）探测活动星系核（AGN），通过[Ne V]发射线与星系巡天交叉关联，可检测到低于直接探测阈值的AGN群体，并预测了两种未来仪器的信噪比表现。
AI.motivation: 现有AGN探测方法对暗弱、尘埃遮蔽的AGN不敏感，需要一种能有效追踪被遮蔽AGN且不受其他天体污染的新探测手段。
AI.method: 利用[Ne V]谱线（电离势97.1 eV）作为AGN活动的纯净示踪剂，通过LIM技术进行强度映射，与星系红移巡天交叉关联，并使用Fisher矩阵形式预测信噪比。
AI.result: CDIM类仪器可在z=2-3对AGN平均强度与偏置因子的乘积给出强约束，红移空间畸变可分解二者；对低于5σ直接探测阈值（z=3时对应L_bol~5×10^43 erg/s）的AGN群体仍保持灵敏度，约10%的来自亚阈值源；PRIMA类仪器信噪比略低，但14.3μm谱线不受尘埃消光影响，提供互补探测。
AI.conclusion: AGN谱线强度映射可应用于追踪AGN总光度历史、约束暗弱光度下黑洞-晕关系、区分超大质量黑洞种子形成机制等科学问题。

title: Little red dots as a cosmological probe: constraining $H_0$ with quasi-periodic pulsations
comment: 11 pages, 2 figures. PRL under review. Comments and suggestions are welcome
summary: The James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) has uncovered a population of ``little red dots'' (LRDs) at $z \gtrsim 4$, potentially representing early supermassive black holes embedded in dense gaseous envelopes. The recent discovery of the lensed LRD RXJ2211-RX1 reveals significant variability on rest-frame timescales of decades, which may be interpreted as quasi-periodic variation that has a potential physical parallel to stellar pulsations. In this work, we derive an idealized, self-consistent period-luminosity-temperature ($P$-$L$-$T_{\rm eff}$) relation based on the hydrostatic envelope model. If this theoretical relation holds and can be empirically validated/calibrated, it would offer a novel framework for constraining the Hubble constant ($H_0$). The current sparse sampling of \tgta\ yields a preliminary $H_0 = 120.7_{-46.5}^{+47.0} \text{ km s}^{-1}\text{ Mpc}^{-1}$ as a proof-of-concept, with the error budget dominated by the uncertainty of the pulsation period. Our forecasting analysis shows that continuous monitoring over a 10-year baseline can reduce the $H_0$ uncertainty to 3-20\%, depending on the intrinsic pulsation period, while the systematic uncertainty floor remains to be fully characterized. This method offers a potential independent probe to measure luminosity distances in the early universe.

AI.tldr: 本文基于“小红点”（LRDs）的脉动现象，推导了周期-光度-温度关系，并提出利用该关系约束哈勃常数的新方法，初步给出H0=120.7 km/s/Mpc，预测10年观测可将不确定度降至3-20%。
AI.motivation: JWST发现的高红移“小红点”可能是早期超大质量黑洞被致密气体包层包裹所致，其中RXJ2211-RX1表现出类似恒星脉动的准周期光变，这为利用脉动关系测量哈勃常数提供了新的可能性。
AI.method: 基于流体静力学包层模型，推导了理想化的周期-光度-有效温度关系；利用该关系结合稀疏观测数据初步估算H0；并通过前瞻性分析评估不同基线长度对H0不确定度的影响。
AI.result: 初步得到H0=120.7_{-46.5}^{+47.0} km/s/Mpc；连续监测10年可将不确定度降至3-20%，但系统误差尚待完整评估。
AI.conclusion: 该脉动方法有望成为早期宇宙中测量光度距离的独立探针，为哈勃常数测定提供新途径。

title: A New Member of the Fast and Furious Family: A Relativistic and Time-Variable UV Outflow in a Luminous Quasar
comment: 40 pages, 12 figures, 10 tables, published in the Astrophysical Journal
summary: We report the fastest quasar outflow first detected in the ultraviolet, via variable C IV and Si IV absorption at outflow velocities $-77,000$ km s$^{-1}$ to at least $-90,000$ km s$^{-1}$, in the radio-quiet quasar SDSS J231854.31+243954.2 (J2318). J2318 is a weak-lined quasar in the rest-frame ultraviolet, but Gemini GNIRS spectroscopy reveals an H$α$ redshift of $z=2.6781\pm0.0004$. A twenty-year photometric time series shows peak-to-peak variability of 0.5 mag in the $g$ band. The C IV outflow strengthened monotonically over three epochs spanning $\sim$2.2 rest-frame years. The existence of such a high-velocity outflow implies that models of quasar outflows must be able to either accelerate gas to $0.3c$ while still preserving C IV and Si IV ions, or enable the formation of C IV and Si IV ions in gas which has been accelerated to $0.3c$. Virial estimates reveal a black-hole mass of $1.65\times10^9~M_\odot$, which leads to an Eddington luminosity and Eddington ratio of $2.4\times10^{47}$ erg s$^{-1}$ and $0.45$, respectively. Using very conservative assumptions, the UV-absorbing outflow alone has an estimated mass loss of $>0.82~M_\odot~{\rm yr}^{-1}$ and a kinetic luminosity ratio $L_{kin}/L_{bol}\geq0.75$%. The lower limit is just above the threshold usually cited for significant feedback on the host galaxy. Comparison to PDS 456, the only other known quasar with a UV-absorbing outflow at $0.3c$, suggests that the true $\dot{M}$ and $L_{kin}/L_{bol}$ could be up to two orders of magnitude larger.

AI.tldr: 在类星体SDSS J231854.31+243954.2中首次探测到紫外波段的最快外流，速度达-77,000至-90,000 km/s（约0.3c），其动能光度比下限超过反馈阈值，对宿主星系具有显著反馈效应。
AI.motivation: 类星体外流对星系演化具有重要反馈作用，但极高速（接近0.3倍光速）的紫外吸收外流极为罕见，此前仅在一个源（PDS 456）中被观测到。发现并研究这类极端外流对于理解类星体反馈机制和星系演化模型至关重要。
AI.method: 利用Gemini GNIRS光谱测量Hα红移（z=2.6781），通过二十年的光变曲线分析g波段0.5星等峰值变化，在三个历元（覆盖约2.2个静止系年）监测C IV吸收线的增强，结合维里估计计算黑洞质量、爱丁顿光度及外流参数。
AI.result: 发现速度-77,000至-90,000 km/s的C IV和Si IV吸收外流；黑洞质量1.65×10^9 M⊙，爱丁顿比0.45；外流质量损失率>0.82 M⊙/yr，动能光度比L_kin/L_bol≥0.75%，超过反馈阈值；与PDS 456对比暗示真实值可能高出两个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 该发现对类星体外流模型提出挑战：模型需解释如何将气体加速至0.3c的同时保持C IV和Si IV离子存在，或如何在已加速的气体中形成这些离子。该外流可能对宿主星系产生显著反馈，其强度可能远超当前保守估计。

title: The quenching time and timescale distribution of z~2 quiescent galaxies from precise colour distribution analysis
comment: Submitted to OJA, comments welcome. Code will be made available on acceptance
summary: Understanding when and how galaxies quench their star formation is crucial for understanding the dominant physical processes at play. The spectral energy distribution (SED) of galaxies encodes significant information on their past histories: the relative importance of different physical processes influences the observed distribution of SED shapes in the galaxy population. We use a simulation based inference (SBI) approach to directly constrain the distribution of formation times, quenching times and quenching timescales within the massive galaxy population at z >~ 2 from their broad band photometric colour distribution at 1.7<z<2. We demonstrate that a simple distribution of double power-law star formation histories accurately fits the distribution of SED shapes of galaxies with log10(M*/Msol)>10.3. We measure a quenched galaxy fraction of 0.24+/-0.02, with the number density of quenched galaxies rising rapidly 2.5Gyr after the Big Bang (z<~2.6). Galaxies must quench rapidly to achieve the precise bimodal colour distribution: defining the quenching timescale as the time from peak star formation rate (SFR_peak) -> 0.5xSFR_peak, the quenching timescale distribution has a mode at 97_{-25}^{+31}Myr, a median of 182+/-16Myr and a tail to ~700Myr. To achieve full quiescence takes a median time of ~400Myr. Comparing to direct number density measurements of quenched galaxies at z>2 the combination of recent and rapid quenching inferred from the fossil record suggests a substantial rejuvenation and/or merger rate for quenched galaxies observed directly at z>3.5.

AI.tldr: 本文利用模拟推断方法，通过宽波段测光颜色分布直接约束红移1.7-2之间大质量星系的形成时间、熄灭时间和熄灭时标，发现星系必须快速熄灭（中位时标约182百万年）才能实现精确的双峰颜色分布。
AI.motivation: 理解星系何时以及如何熄灭其恒星形成活动，对于揭示主导的物理过程至关重要。
AI.method: 采用基于模拟的推断方法，利用宽波段测光颜色分布，通过双幂律恒星形成历史模型来约束星系的形成时间、熄灭时间和熄灭时标。
AI.result: 熄灭星系比例为0.24±0.02；熄灭时标分布众数为97_{-25}^{+31}百万年，中位数为182±16百万年，最长达约700百万年；完全静止所需中位时间约400百万年。
AI.conclusion: 大质量星系在红移约2.6之后快速熄灭，结合化石记录与高红移直接数密度测量，表明红移>3.5观测到的熄灭星系存在显著的重启和/或并合事件。

title: A Decade to Map the Diffuse Universe: FRB-QSO Pairs with HST/COS Spectroscopy
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure; White Paper submitted to STScI and NASA GSFC in response to "Building a Roadmap for Hubble Science into the 2030s"
summary: Jointly analyzing the sightlines of arcsecond-localized fast radio bursts (FRBs) and UV-bright quasars (QSOs) nearby in projection has the potential to provide strong constraints on the phases, mass distributions, and magnetic structure of the diffuse universe. Each probe supplies what the other cannot: FRBs provide integrated electron columns (DM), line-of-sight magnetic field estimates (RM), and scattering constraints ($τ_{\rm scatt}$) that are independent of gas phase; QSOs provide the redshift- and phase-resolved column densities needed to interpret them. Today, there are only $\sim100$ arcsecond-localized FRBs at $z < 1$, making statistical FRB-QSO pair surveys impossible. By 2035, there will be $\sim10^{5}$. Using the most recent FRB localization forecasts and UV-bright QSO catalogs, we estimate that next-generation interferometers will yield thousands of FRB--QSO pairs at angular separations $θ< 10'$, including $\sim100$ pairs at $θ< 1'$, over a common 20,000\,deg$^2$ footprint by 2035. We outline the science enabled by this sample: constraints on CGM ionization fractions and baryon masses; observational constraints on the role of magnetic fields and turbulence in the CGM and cosmic web; sightline-by-sightline partitioning of the cosmic DM budget; and three-dimensional mapping of the multiphase Milky Way and M31 halos. Together, these measurements directly address the physics of feedback, non-thermal pressure support, and energy balance in the diffuse gas that regulates galaxy growth. HST/COS is the only instrument that can carry out this program, and the 2030s are the only decade in which to do it before Habitable Worlds Observatory (HWO) defines the next era of diffuse universe science.

AI.tldr: 本文预测到2035年，下一代干涉仪将探测到数千个快速射电暴（FRB）与紫外亮类星体（QSO）的投影对，利用HST/COS联合分析可约束宇宙弥散介质的电离分数、重子质量、磁场结构和湍流，并绘制多相银河系及M31晕的三维地图。
AI.motivation: 目前仅约100个角秒级定位的FRB（z<1），无法进行统计性FRB-QSO成对巡天。联合分析FRB与邻近QSO的视线方向可互补各自探测能力，但现有样本量不足。
AI.method: 利用最新的FRB定位预测和紫外亮QSO星表，估算下一代干涉仪到2035年在20000平方度天区内可获得的FRB-QSO成对数量（θ<10'达数千对，θ<1'约100对）。
AI.result: 到2035年，将获得数千对θ<10'的FRB-QSO对，其中约100对θ<1'，覆盖20000平方度共同天区。
AI.conclusion: HST/COS是唯一能执行该计划的仪器，2030年代是在HWO定义下一时代之前开展此项研究的唯一窗口期。

title: Metal-Poor Gas Accretion Drives Giant Clump Formation at 0.6 < z < 2.6
summary: The physical properties of kiloparsec-scale clumps in high-redshift star-forming galaxies (SFGs) contain crucial constraints on how they assemble. Building on recent work that indicates the presence of a metallicity offset in clumpy galaxies compared to nonclumpy SFGs, we analyze the chemical abundance in a large sample of ${\sim}300$ SFGs between $0.6<z<2.6$ using LEGA-C, MOSDEF and CANUCS near-infrared spectroscopic observations. We find that clumpy galaxies generally have lower gas-phase metallcities compared to the mass-metallicity relation, while nonclumpy galaxies have higher metallicities. We further investigate the relationship between the resolved stellar properties of clumps and the integrated gas-phase metallicity of the host galaxies using a subset of galaxies observed in the CANUCS fields. In particular, clumps in SFGs with metallicity below the mass-metallicity relation (i.e., $ΔZ \leq 0$) are generally younger and have higher SFRs, compared to clumps whose host galaxies have $ΔZ > 0$. We do not find a significant mass difference between these two clump populations. Finally, we compute the merger statistic using the Gini-M20 morphological parameters and find that the majority of clumpy galaxies are not classified as mergers based on their stellar mass maps. The results suggest that the clumpy nature of cosmic noon galaxies is linked to metal-poor gas accretion events that trigger star formation and dilute metallicities.

AI.tldr: 本研究分析了约300个高红移（0.6<z<2.6）恒星形成星系的化学丰度，发现团块星系通常比质量-金属丰度关系预测的金属丰度更低，而非团块星系则更高。团块星系中金属丰度低于预期的宿主星系，其团块更年轻、恒星形成率更高，且多数团块星系并非并合事件，表明其团块性质与富金属贫乏气体吸积事件有关。
AI.motivation: 千秒差距尺度团块的物理性质对理解高红移恒星形成星系的组装机制至关重要。前期研究表明团块星系存在金属丰度偏移，本文旨在通过大样本光谱观测系统探究这一现象。
AI.method: 利用LEGA-C、MOSDEF和CANUCS近红外光谱观测，分析了约300个0.6<z<2.6的恒星形成星系。通过质量-金属丰度关系对比团块与非团块星系的化学丰度，并利用CANUCS子样本研究团块恒星性质与宿主星系整体金属丰度的关系，最后使用Gini-M20形态参数计算并合统计量。
AI.result: 团块星系整体上质量-金属丰度关系偏低，非团块星系偏高。金属丰度低于预期的星系中，团块更年轻、恒星形成率更高，但质量无显著差异。多数团块星系不被归类为并合事件。
AI.conclusion: 团块星系的特征与金属贫乏气体吸积事件相关，这些事件触发恒星形成并稀释金属丰度，而非主要由并合过程驱动。
